safety_use_cases.label: Speeding detection across existing cameras at Hub East
safety_use_cases.description: Enable speeding detection by calibrating selected camera views with fixed-point measurements so Granite Ridge Works can flag vehicle speeding across their existing cameras at the Hub East facility.

evidence.quote: there is an expansion opportunity here with them, but we're having, they want to add some new use cases around speeding just across their existing cameras.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Really, the only thing that's super top of mind for me is getting speeding enabled.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We need to pick two points on these and measure the distance, distances between them.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: As soon as we have those distances, we'll get speeding enabled on our side.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Eliminate 517 warehouse blind spot to capture PPE violations
safety_use_cases.description: Add or re-scope camera coverage in the 517 AA Mail area to remove blind spots so Voxel can detect PPE non-compliance (e.g., missing vests) and activity in that zone.

evidence.quote: I found a blind spot in the 517 warehouse, but I didn't know how to let you know where it is and if we have cameras there.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Marlowe <fake.morgan.marlowe@graniteridgeworks.com>

evidence.quote: this lady kept walking past me with no vest on, and I'm like, wait a minute, I'm not getting any indication.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Marlowe <fake.morgan.marlowe@graniteridgeworks.com>

evidence.quote: And that whole area where the red bag carts are, we have no coverage of.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Marlowe <fake.morgan.marlowe@graniteridgeworks.com>
